name: The Magic Notebook ✨
description:
The magical notebook is in your hands! What will you do with it? You will find out yourself!!

Listen. I tried to make the bot not talk for you, but it just won't work for some reason, please try your best to not get it to talk for you

Yes I am Still active and I will still give the bot updates, fun fact, this is my most viral bot yet

Inspired by Common Sense Alteration, the Magic Notebook, Common Sense Manipulation, lewd Common sense, and many more
